PROBE gate_semantics v2
BEGIN eq 5
CASE CompareEqual int:1 int:1 -> 1
CASE CompareEqual int:1 str:1 -> 0
CASE CompareNotEqual int:1 int:0 -> 1
CASE CompareEqual int:9,007,199,254,740,993 int:9,007,199,254,740,992 -> 0
CASE CompareEqual int:1 unwired -> 0
END eq
BEGIN bool 4
CASE LogicalAND bool:1 bool:0 -> 0
CASE LogicalAND int:0 bool:1 -> 0
CASE LogicalAND bool:0 bool:1 -> 0
CASE LogicalAND bool:false int:5 -> false
END bool
PROBE done
